policy: Normal gameplay work records editor hooks here. The editor UI itself is updated in batches when the user explicitly asks to update the editor.

items.title: 기초 에디터 준비실
items.summary: manifest, backlog, asset slots, and local save key summaries can be reviewed from a separate editor page.

items.title: 테마 전환 미리보기 에디터 연결
items.summary: Expose the murim retarget preview in editor manifest/backlog and show text/asset coverage from the editor summary without applying live data changes.

items.title: 밸런스 조정 표면 읽기 전용 연결
items.summary: Expose the balance tuning registry, tutorial pacing, pinned tuning candidates, monster candidate reward preview, pending candidate promotion checklist, and codex record targets as read-only editor metadata surfaces before building full balance editing controls.

items.title: 전투 VFX 배치 미리보기 에디터 연결
items.summary: Expose player and monster combat VFX placement rows in the read-only editor so attack effect offsets can be compared before manual tuning.

items.title: 몬스터 전투 스프라이트 슬롯 후보
items.summary: Expose monster sprite readiness, file scanning, draft assetId candidates, patch export drafts, ready connection plans, missing-file handoffs, and an editor-visible apply-preview summary that compares ready patches against the missing-file handoff before final monster WebP ingestion.

items.title: 세계선 저장 데이터 수동 편집
items.summary: Read-only save slot diagnostics, validation/rollback contract preview, staged edit draft payload shape, staged draft diff summary, apply gate checklist, recovery rehearsal preview, apply-gate recovery readiness summary, edit-input schema preview, proposed-value validation matrix, validation-rule drilldown, proposed-value sample payload preview, validator dry-run plan, validator registry contract preview, validator result schema preview, non-mutating validator dry-run result preview, proposed-value input shell/sample injector preview, dry-run sample result comparator preview, sample-result-to-bridge blocker summary preview, produced-result bridge contract preview, bridge transition checklist preview, validator result source adapter plan preview, selected-source handoff contract preview, adapter runner preflight preview, confirmation phrase/source selection contract preview, confirmation input shell contract preview, confirmation match/result-source review summary preview, submit-runner blocker contract preview, final apply-runner handoff checklist preview, validator result-to-apply gate bridge preview, compatibility-to-confirmation preflight blocker rollup preview, confirmation preflight preview, confirmation input/apply-runner contract preview, confirmation-input-to-runner handoff blocker summary preview, writer payload/rollback checkpoint preview, post-write validation/restore route contract preview, and writer enablement risk/manual unlock checklist preview are connected. Manual editing for active save, save slots, gold, level, region, equipment, inventory, and profile still needs confirmed writer controls.

items.title: 노드맵 수동 구성 에디터
items.summary: Edit node positions, connections, node type budgets, hidden nodes, merchant/rest/treasure nodes, and background image slots.

items.title: 이미지/사운드 슬롯 관리자
items.summary: Manage expected file names, folders, missing assets, and crop presets for images and audio.

items.title: 아이템/몬스터 DB 관리
items.summary: Edit equipment, item icons, monster stats, monster sprites, rewards, drop tables, and future legendary options.

items.title: 첫 각성/성향 질문 편집
items.summary: Read-only initial player setup preview is connected for profile defaults, dice stat rules, abyss questions, hidden starter-card slots, disposition weights, and prologue event flow. Editing controls are still future work.

items.title: 사운드/볼륨 기본값 설정
items.summary: Configure default BGM/SFX volume and per-scene audio file slots.

items.title: 안드로이드 PWA 업데이트 셸 기준
items.summary: Track hosted PWA update manifest, GitHub Pages deployment, Android shell update boundaries, and release checklist for future APK or Trusted Web Activity packaging.

items.title: 에디터 변경점 검증/내보내기
items.summary: Validate changed JSON, create backup snapshots, and export editor changes into game runtime data files.
